name: Tofu-Noodle-Poppy Seed Casserole (Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain well and set aside.
2. Sauté onion and green pepper in butter in a Dutch oven until tender; add flour, stirring until smooth.
3. Cook 1 minute, stirring constantly. Gradually add milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
4. Stir in noodles, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, poppy seeds, salt, red pepper, and tofu; add pimiento, and stir gently.
5. Spoon mixture into a lightly greased 12- x 8- x 2-inch baking dish. Cover and chill 8 hours.
6. To bake, remove from refrigerator and let stand at room temperature 30 minutes.
7. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Uncover, and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons cheese.
9. Bake, uncovered, an additional 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Note: I use one pound of tofu cut into 1-inch squares instead of turkey (I am a vegetarian). It does not have to refrigerate, but the tastes do mingle better if it does. I usually sprinkle more than 2 tablespoons of cheese on top.
